archetype: Automated Lunar Regolith Excavation Site Planning and Optimization System for In-Situ Resource Utilization (ISRU)
description: This system helps mission planners optimize excavation sites for lunar regolith, which is crucial for in-situ resource utilization (ISRU) in future lunar missions. The system takes into account geological, topological, and environmental factors to select the best excavation sites. It is technically challenging due to the need to integrate data from various sources, including satellite imagery, geological surveys, and environmental monitoring systems.
rules: MUST adhere to NASA's Planetary Protection Policy to prevent contamination of the lunar regolith
MUST comply with the NASA Technical Standards for Planetary Resource Utilization
MUST integrate with NASA's Earth Observing System (EOS) for access to satellite imagery
MUST use the Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter (LRO) data for topological and geological analysis
MUST ensure data compatibility with the ISRU system's software framework
anti_patterns: DO NOT assume uniformity in the lunar regolith's composition and structure
DO NOT neglect the effects of lunar dust on excavation equipment and ISRU systems
DO NOT overlook the need for continuous environmental monitoring during excavation
key_technical_challenges: Integrating data from multiple sources with different formats and resolutions
Developing an optimization algorithm that balances excavation efficiency with environmental and safety concerns
Ensuring the system's scalability and performance for large-scale excavation operations

recommended_stack.language: Python - widely used in the space industry and suitable for data-intensive applications
recommended_stack.framework: Django - provides a robust framework for building complex data-driven applications
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL - supports spatial data types and geometric operations
recommended_stack.cache: Redis - suitable for caching spatial data and query results
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ - provides a reliable messaging system for integrating with other NASA systems

compliance_flags: NASA Technical Standards for Planetary Resource Utilization
